title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Grofers Logistics

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Grofers Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Grofers Logistics! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Grofers Logistics:
Grofers Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Logistics!
